doc: Polyphonic playable rig (8 voices) with a mono Freeverb in the master path. Each voice is a hosted `reverb-voice` sub-patch; the voicer sums them and the reverb processes the mix. Send /voicer/notes [midi, gate] to play (e.g. [69.0, 1.0] note-on A4, [69.0, 0.0] note-off; several = a chord). Shape the space live over OSC: /reverb/room (tail length 0..1), /reverb/damp (high-frequency damping 0..1), /reverb/mix (dry/wet 0..1).

nodes.doc: Hosts 8 reverb-voice sub-patches; allocates notes across them and sums their audio.
Mono Freeverb on the master bus.
